query:
UPDATE partners p
JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
SET p.bankName = '招商银行股份有限公司苏州干将路支行', p.accountNumber = '6214835126410255'
WHERE c.name = '无锡';

UPDATE partners p
JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
SET p.bankName = '中国银行股份有限公司郑州嵩山南路支行', p.accountNumber = '6217858000108793883'
WHERE c.name = '郑州';
